---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue with a deployment template
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Template Affected
Which template is affected? [e.g. fastapi-postgres, node-mongo, nginx-reverse-proxy]

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the issue.

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Environment
- Docker Version: [e.g. 24.0.0]
- Docker Compose Version: [e.g. 2.20.0]
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information.
